title: australopyrum pectinatum var. calcis
intro: Australopyrum pectinatum var. calcis, also known as the calcic form of the Australopyrum pectinatum, is a specific variety of a flowering plant native to Australia, although it is now extinct. Unfortunately, I can't find any information about the medicinal properties, health benefits, and herbal preparations of Australopyrum pectinatum var. calcis.
